accessToken.description: Beeper Matrix access token returned by login.

appserviceId.description: Matrix appservice id used in registration namespaces.

asToken.description: Appservice token returned by Beeper bridge registration.

allowedRoomIds.description: Optional allow-list of Matrix rooms the bridge may import from.

allowedUserIds.description: Optional allow-list of Matrix users the bridge may accept commands from.

beeperEnv.description: Beeper environment for login and appservice registration.

bridgeId.description: Beeper self-hosted bridge id, derived as sh-openclaw-$deviceid by login setup.

dataDir.description: Directory for bridge config, registration, and runtime state.

homeserver.description: Beeper Matrix homeserver URL returned by login.

hsToken.description: Homeserver token returned by Beeper bridge registration.

matrixDeviceId.description: Beeper Matrix device id for this bridge.

matrixUserId.description: Beeper Matrix user id for this bridge.

bridgeManagerToken.description: Beeper bridge-manager token used to register the self-hosted bridge.

importSources.description: OpenClaw session sources to import and backfill.

backfillLimit.description: Maximum OpenClaw messages to backfill per imported session.

contactVisibility.description: Which OpenClaw identities should appear in Beeper contacts.

homeserverDomain.description: Homeserver domain advertised in the Beeper appservice registration.

approvalBehavior.description: How Beeper approval decisions resolve OpenClaw approval gates.
